sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46655" key="h)=3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἦ δ᾽ ὅς</orth>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔφη ἐκεῖνος</foreign>, <sense id="n46655.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἠμί</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
